theme: Prague — Europe's most photogenic corporate destination

linkedin.text:
There's a reason we keep coming back to Prague.

We've produced 12 events there. Different clients. Different industries. Different group sizes.

The result is always the same: people are stunned.

Not because it's surprising — but because no photo or video does it justice.

Prague for corporate events:

🏰 Gala dinners inside actual castles (not "castle-themed" hotels)
🍺 Czech craft beer tasting with a master brewer
🚢 Vltava River dinner cruise at golden hour
🎭 Private jazz concert in a baroque cellar
🏛️ Old Town Square — the most photographed plaza in Central Europe

Practical reasons to love Prague:
→ 3.5h direct flight from Tel Aviv
→ 40% cheaper than Vienna or Paris for equivalent quality
→ No visa requirements
→ Strong event infrastructure
→ English widely spoken

One of our clients from the pharma sector put it best:
"Everyone came back talking about Prague. Nobody talked about last year's Tel Aviv gala."

The difference is the story.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Prague #CzechRepublic #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventDestination #UproductionEvents #MICE #TeamBuilding
